skill.name: ai-social-media-content
skill.description: Create AI-powered social media content for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X. Generate: images, videos, reels, shorts, thumbnails, captions, hashtags. Tools: FLUX, Veo, Seedance, Wan, Kokoro TTS, Claude for copywriting. Use for: content creators, social media managers, influencers, brands. Triggers: social media content, tiktok, instagram reels, youtube shorts, twitter post, content creator, ai influencer, social content, reels, shorts, viral content, thumbnail generator, caption generator, hashtag generator, ugc content
skill.summary: Create AI-powered social media content for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X. Generate: images, ...
skill.author: inference-sh-9

security_audit.summary: All 45 static findings are false positives. The skill uses legitimate CLI commands (infsh app run) for AI content generation. Network URLs point to the inference.sh service. Shell patterns (curl|sh, variable expansion) are standard practices for CLI tools with proper checksum verification.

content.value_statement: Creating social media content across multiple platforms requires different formats, dimensions, and styles. This skill automates AI-powered image and video generation for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and Twitter with ready-to-use templates.
actual_capabilities: Generate vertical videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts using Veo AI
Create images for social posts using FLUX and Seedance models
Produce AI voiceovers using Kokoro TTS with multiple voice options
Generate engaging captions and hashtags using Claude copywriting
Create multi-platform content from a single concept (long-to-short pipeline)
Batch generate content for a week of posting across platforms
limitations: Requires inference.sh account and API access for AI generation
Video generation limited to 60-second maximum duration
Does not include audio/music licensing or trending sound addition
Output quality depends on prompt engineering skill

use_cases.title: Viral TikTok Video Creation
use_cases.description: Generate trending-style vertical videos with ASMR aesthetics, satisfying visuals, and hook-first content for TikTok reach.

use_cases.title: Multi-Platform Brand Content
use_cases.description: Create a single concept and automatically generate images for Instagram feed, thumbnails for YouTube, and visual posts for Twitter.

use_cases.title: AI Talking Head Videos
use_cases.description: Generate script with Claude, create voiceover with Kokoro TTS, and produce AI avatar videos for faceless content creation.

prompt_templates.title: Basic TikTok Video
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a 15-second vertical video for TikTok. Topic: [YOUR TOPIC]. Style: trending, satisfying, hook in first second. Use vibrant colors and fast cuts.

prompt_templates.title: Instagram Carousel Set
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate 5 cohesive Instagram carousel images. Theme: [YOUR THEME]. Style: consistent aesthetic, neutral tones, Instagram-quality. Each image should flow into the next.

prompt_templates.title: YouTube Thumbnail
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a clickable YouTube thumbnail. Topic: [YOUR TOPIC]. Include: surprised or shocked expression, bold text space on right, bright background, high contrast, attention-grabbing design.

prompt_templates.title: Full Multi-Platform Campaign
prompt_templates.prompt: Take this concept: [YOUR CONCEPT]. Generate: 1) TikTok vertical 9:16 with text overlays 2) Instagram square post with minimal design 3) YouTube 16:9 thumbnail with bold typography. Ensure consistent brand colors.

output_examples.input: Generate a TikTok video about morning coffee routine
output_examples.output: A vertical 9:16 video file showing a cozy morning coffee aesthetic with golden hour lighting, steam rising from the cup, ASMR-style slow motion shots, ready for TikTok posting.

output_examples.input: Create an Instagram carousel about productivity tips
output_examples.output: 5 cohesive square images with consistent minimalist design, numbered productivity tips, neutral color palette, smooth transitions between slides.

output_examples.input: Make a YouTube thumbnail for a tech review video
output_examples.output: A 1280x720 thumbnail with surprised reaction face, bold space for title text, bright yellow background, high contrast colors for click-through rate optimization.

best_practices: Hook viewers in the first 3 seconds with the most engaging visual moment
Generate content in vertical 9:16 format first, then adapt to other platforms
Use consistent aesthetic and brand colors across all content for recognition
anti_patterns: Generating horizontal 16:9 videos for TikTok or Reels (wrong aspect ratio)
Creating inconsistent visual styles across carousel posts
Forgetting to leave space for platform UI elements like buttons and captions

faq.question: Do I need an account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need an inference.sh account with API access. Sign up at inference.sh and install the CLI tool.

faq.question: Which AI models are supported?
faq.answer: The skill supports FLUX for images, Veo and Seedance for videos, Kokoro for TTS, and Claude for copywriting via the inference.sh platform.

faq.question: Can I generate content for all platforms at once?
faq.answer: Yes, the multi-platform repurposing feature lets you create TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and Twitter content from a single concept.

faq.question: What video duration is supported?
faq.answer: TikTok and Reels support 15-60 seconds. YouTube Shorts supports under 60 seconds. Twitter allows videos up to 140 seconds.

faq.question: Does this skill add trending audio?
faq.answer: No, the skill generates visual content only. You will need to add trending sounds separately in your video editor.

faq.question: Can I batch generate multiple videos?
faq.answer: Yes, use the batch creation workflow with a topic list to generate multiple content pieces in one command.
